scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && npm install
scripts.postinstall: PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR=/opt/render/project/src/.puppeteer-cache node -e "import('puppeteer/internal/node/install.js').then(m => m.downloadBrowser()).then(() => console.log('OK Chrome descargado')).catch(e => {console.error('Error:', e.message); process.exit(1)})"
